case_title: ARMANDO DE LOERA MEJIA VS. SF MULTIFAMILY IV PROPERTY OWNER, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-14-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SF MULTIFAMILY IV PROPERTY OWNER, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ARMANDO DE LOERA MEJIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SF MULTIFAMILY IV PROPERTY OWNER, LLC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA VALDEZ, PARALEGAL AND PARENT COMPANY. THE COURT ALLOWS MS. VALEZ TO SPEAK ON BEHALF OF BOTH DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL FROM PLANTIFF AFTER HEARING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LOERA MEJIA, ARMANDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SF MULTIFAMILY IV PROPERTY OWNER, LLC BRICK + TIMBER, INC $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,080.00, SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY DE LOERA MEJIA, ARMANDO AS TO DEFENDANT SF MULTIFAMILY IV PROPERTY OWNER, LLC BRICK + TIMBER, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
